nodes.label: Unit tests for lucidity event dispatcher.  Tests the lucidity event broadcasting
Dispatch a lucidity change event and return the payload.
Test liability formatting with empty input via send_lucidity_change_event.
Test liability formatting with a single liability.
Test liability formatting with multiple stacks.
Test liability formatting with multiple entries.
Test liability formatting with invalid stack values.
Test liability formatting skips entries with empty code.
Test send_lucidity_change_event with reason and source.
Test send_lucidity_change_event handles dispatch errors gracefully.
Test send_catatonia_event with rescuer and target names.
Test send_catatonia_event handles dispatch errors gracefully.
Test send_rescue_update_event with all optional fields.
Test send_rescue_update_event handles dispatch errors gracefully.
